zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg於1013年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 海斯格瓦瑟格時，他的父親Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG34歲，母親Bava van Hamaland21歲。他與Bertha van Zutphen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1082年10月25日在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg于1013年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可萊斯 海斯格瓦瑟格时，他的父亲Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG34岁，母亲Bava van Hamaland21岁。他与Bertha van Zutphen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1082年10月25日在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wassenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: habitational name from Wassenberg in North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany or from Wassenberg in Temse, East Flanders.

nameMeanings.name: Gerhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg was born in 1013, in Wassenberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG, was 34 and his mother, Bava van Hamaland, was 21. He married Bertha van Zutphen. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 25 October 1082, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg est né en 1013, à Wassenberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Bava van Hamaland, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Bertha van Zutphen. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1082, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg 1013 in Wassenberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG 34 und seine Mutter Bava van Hamaland 21. Er hat Bertha van Zutphen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1082 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg è nato il nel 1013 nel Wassenberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Bava van Hamaland, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Bertha van Zutphen. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 ottobre 1082, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenbergが1013年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレイス ヘインスバーグワセンバーグで生まれた時，父Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERGは34歳，母Bava van Hamalandは21歳であった。Bertha van Zutphenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1082年10月25日に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg(이)가 1013년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 크레이스 하인스버그 와센버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Bava van Hamaland(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Bertha van Zutphen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1082년 10월 25일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg nasceu em 1013, em Wassenberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Bava van Hamaland, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha van Zutphen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1082, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg родился в 1013 г. в местности вассенбирг, крис хаинсбирг, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Bava van Hamaland, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha van Zutphen. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 25 октября 1082 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.

sm.1042-1052: mai le 1042 e o'o I le 1052

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerhard II 'Flamens' von Wassenberg nació en 1013, en Wassenberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gerard FLAMENS VAN ANTOING VAN WASSENBERG, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Bava van Hamaland, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Bertha van Zutphen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1082, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años.
